Happy Birthday

It's funny how we started. Back in November 2019, I don't think either of us expected we'd still be here years later. We argued a lot then... honestly, we still do. Maybe that's just part of our friendship. Right now things aren't exactly okay between us. We both know that.

But birthdays aren't about pretending nothing happened. They're about celebrating the people who made our lives a little different, a little brighter. And whether we're talking every day or not, you're still one of those people to me. You were there during some of the darkest moments of my life. I don't think I'll ever forget that. So this isn't an apology, and it's not me asking for anything.

It's simply a reminder that despite all the misunderstandings, the silence, and the fights, I still consider you a friend. I hope this year brings you more reasons to smile, more dreams to chase, and reminds you that life isn't a race everyone has their own Karera. Keep believing in yourself, keep shining, and never lose the person that makes people around you laugh. Thank you for all the memories we've made both the chaotic ones and the ones I'll always treasure.

Happy Birthday.

- TOBEY

🎧 blasting BINI on repeat for you today

Reasons you go hard

— Zero patience for nonsense, all patience for the people who matter
— Main character in every room, no cap
— Loyal to the ones she loves, even when she's mad at them
— Actual walking BINI stan card

🎂
it's your year now

My Whishes For You

My only wish for you is simple: I hope you're genuinely happy no matter where life takes you or what path you choose. May you always find reasons to smile, chase the things you love, and become the person you've always wanted to be. You deserve that kind of happiness.

Happy Birthday. 🌸
